summary: MealRandom MVP — both backend and frontend tested. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases pass (auth, profile/TDEE+Diet adjustment, keywords, 38 seeded meals incl. Pad Thai/Tom Yum/Green Curry/Pad Krapow/Khao Soi, random with vegan + shellfish + diet/low_fat filters, full log CRUD, admin-only meal CRUD + 403 for non-admin, Spoonacular admin-only search). Frontend (mobile viewport 375x667): admin login → routes to onboarding (5 steps) → tabs; Home shows daily target 2260 kcal/consumed 0/remaining 2260; Randomize tab renders 4 horizontally-scrollable chip groups (countries/cooking_methods/carbs/protein) all with testIDs; Profile tab toggles Random↔Diet and subtitle correctly switches to '2260 TDEE · −400 diet'; Admin tab is admin-only and displays 38-meal catalog with edit/delete/+ New meal/Import Thai actions. No console errors, no red screen, no deprecated expo packages detected.

ui_bugs.issue: In Diet mode the big 'DAILY CALORIE TARGET' number remains 2260 (TDEE) instead of the adjusted 1860; only the subtitle reflects '−400 diet'. The Home tab also shows 2260 in Diet mode. Recommend showing the adjusted value (daily_calorie_adjusted) as the prominent number so users actually see their reduced target.

issues: Chip rows are horizontally scrollable but the rightmost chips (e.g. 'British' in Countries, 'Smoke' in Cooking Methods) are clipped at the edge with no visual scroll hint — consider a fade/gradient or scroll indicator.

action_items: OPTIONAL UI polish: surface the adjusted daily target (1860) prominently in Diet mode on Profile & Home, not just in the subtitle.
OPTIONAL: add a fade gradient or visible scrollbar to keyword chip rows so users discover off-screen chips.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~565-line module; acceptable for MVP but as features grow consider splitting into routers (auth, meals, logs, admin).
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded in every query via projection {'_id': 0}. ✓
JWT secret, admin password and Spoonacular API key are read from .env (no hardcoded defaults). ✓
All interactive elements observed have testID (login-*, onb-*, kw-*, random-roll-button, home-randomize-button, profile-purpose-*). ✓

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all critical screens render and tab navigation works; Diet-mode prominent number is a minor UX nit

seed_data_creation: Backend startup auto-seeds 38 meals + admin user (idempotent). Tests create only TEST_-prefixed users/meals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified — reuse /app/backend/tests/test_mealrandom_api.py. For UI add-to-today flow, after tapping [data-testid='random-roll-button'] the meal card with [data-testid='add-to-today-button'] needs ~2-3s wait for API response before it becomes visible (couldn't fully verify in my run but Randomize button does call the API successfully).
rca_of_issue: Diet-mode big-number display: in profile.tsx / home/index.tsx the rendered value is likely daily_calorie_target (TDEE) instead of daily_calorie_adjusted. Backend response already contains both; frontend should use daily_calorie_adjusted as the displayed target everywhere (Home pie/remaining math, Profile big number).
